The '''United Tribes Command''' was the [[Army/Legends|military]] force of the [[United Tribes of Kariek]], the government of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kariek]] in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]].
{{Military-stub}}
